mechanism_narrative: Persistent growth in nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) signals strong labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of periods with sustained PAYEMS growth (> 100k monthly additions).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month decline in the federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) below 2.0% signals imminent monetary easing, reducing discount rates and boosting equity valuations, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows negative 5d returns in 75%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS declines below 2.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in the unemployment rate (UNRATE) and increases in residential construction (HOUST) signal robust demand conditions, creating positive momentum in S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term between UNRATE and HOUST shows negative coefficient in 3-year rolling regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above 109.5 signals strengthening manufacturing activity, which drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows negative 20d returns in 60%+ of periods with INDPRO above 109.5.

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation (CPIAUCSL) above 2.5% combined with stagnant GDP growth (GDPC1) indicates stagflation risks, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term between CPIAUCSL and GDPC1 shows positive coefficient in 3-year rolling regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month decline in real sales (RSAFS) below 500 billion signals weakening consumer demand, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 5d returns in 75%+ of instances where RSAFS declines below 500.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in unemployment (UNRATE) above 4.2% indicates labor market deterioration, causing negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 20d returns in 60%+ of periods with UNRATE above 4.2%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in industrial production (INDPRO) and housing starts (HOUST) signal weakening supply-side momentum, resulting in negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term between INDPRO and HOUST shows positive coefficient in 3-year rolling regressions.
